allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\scoop\\shims\\node.exe","$env:ProgramData\\nvm\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ "FOUND: $p" } }; "--- searching fnm/volta/nvm ---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3; Get-Command node,npm,npx,pnpm,yarn,volta,fnm,nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source)
